custom_css: header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:0 1px 0 #b48a00,0 2px 0 #8c6a00,0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5)!important;position:relative!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:15px!important;z-index:10!important;padding-right:0!important;overflow:hidden!important}header .title-3d::before{content:''!important;position:absolute!important;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(251,223,7,0.1) 0, rgba(251,223,7,0.1) 5px, transparent 5px, transparent 15px, rgba(0,168,89,0.1) 15px, rgba(0,168,89,0.1) 20px, transparent 20px, transparent 30px);opacity:0.6!important;animation:fitas-dia-criancas 3s linear infinite!important;z-index:1!important;pointer-events:none!important}@keyframes fitas-dia-criancas{from{transform:translateY(-10px)}to{transform:translateY(0)}}header button{background:#fbdf07!important;border:2px solid #00a859!important;border-radius:20px!important;color:#fff!important;position:relative!important;z-index:20!important;transition:transform 0.1s!important}header button:active{transform:scale(0.85)!important}aside .btn-pulse{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff477e,#fbdf07)!important;color:#000!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:20px!important;position:relative!important;overflow:hidden!important;border:none!important;animation:pulse-dia-criancas 1.8s infinite!important}@keyframes pulse-dia-criancas{0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.03);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,71,126,0.6)!important}100%{transform:scale(1)}}aside .btn-pulse:active{animation:vibra-dia-criancas 0.1s infinite!important}@keyframes vibra-dia-criancas{0%{transform:translate(1px,1px)}50%{transform:translate(-1px,-1px)}100%{transform:translate(0,0)}}#streak-input{background:#fff!important;border:2px solid #ff477e!important;color:#000!important;border-radius:20px!important;font-weight:bold!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#ff477e!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:#ff477e!important;height:5px!important;border-radius:3px!important}
